narrative:
Southern Point (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,179 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.3 percentage points.
